# Eight38

> AI automation solutions for businesses. We build custom workflow automation using n8n and AI, so teams can stop doing repetitive work and focus on what matters.

## About

Eight38 is a business automation agency based in Cape Town, South Africa, serving clients globally. We design and implement custom automation solutions for small and medium businesses using no-code and low-code platforms.

## Services

- [Lead Response System](/services.html): AI-powered lead qualification and follow-up in under 2 minutes
- [Client Reporting Autopilot](/services.html): Automated data pulls, AI insights, and branded report delivery
- [Content Repurposing Engine](/services.html): Turn one piece of content into 10+ across platforms
- [Custom Workflow Automation](/services.html): Tailored automation for any business process

## Key Details

- Location: Cape Town, South Africa (remote services globally)
- Speciality: n8n, Make.com, Zapier, AI-powered automation
- Target clients: SMBs with 5-100 employees
- Pricing: R15,000-R500,000+ depending on complexity
- Contact: hello@eight38.com

## Free Resources

- [Automation Readiness Checklist](/resources/automation-readiness-checklist.html): 15-point assessment to evaluate if your business is ready for automation
- [Platform Comparison Guide](/resources/choosing-automation-platform.html): n8n vs Make.com vs Zapier side-by-side
- [Workflow Automation Playbook](/resources/workflow-automation-playbook.html): Step-by-step implementation guide
